title: [CI:DOCS] Adds missing . to README.md file.
body:
Adds missing . to README.md file.

Signed-off-by: Fredrik Lindqvist <landrash@mail.com>

comments.body:
Thanks @Landrash 
Sadly even for this small change, you have to sign your commit

git commit -a --amend -s
git push --force

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *Landrash*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Note that it's signed (https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/7792/commits/c43dce1ec55a865f4c7f08f2de7b559414160125) but there needs to be an empty line.

> Note that it's signed ([c43dce1](https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/c43dce1ec55a865f4c7f08f2de7b559414160125)) but there needs to be an empty line.

Can confirm that it was the problem.
Thanks for helping resolve it :)
